title: Sweet Creamy Argentinian Tofu Ceviche
description: A bright, sweet, and creamy tofu ceviche that captures Argentine flavors with a tangy cider vinegar base and a splash of agave sweetness, perfect for a fancy vegetarian date night.
instructions: Press the tofu between paper towels and a heavy pan for 15 minutes to remove excess moisture.
Cube the tofu into bite‑sized pieces and set aside.
In a wide bowl, whisk together lime juice, cider vinegar, and agave syrup until the syrup is fully dissolved.
Add the tofu cubes to the vinaigrette and stir gently to coat. Let the mixture marinate at room temperature for 10 minutes, or refrigerate for a deeper flavor.
While the tofu marinates, dice the mango and onion, and chop the cilantro.
After 10 minutes, remove the tofu from the bowl and gently fold in the mango, onion, cilantro, and avocado.
Season with salt and pepper to taste, and stir until everything is evenly combined.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 15 minutes before serving to allow flavors to meld.
Serve chilled on a platter or individual plates, garnished with extra cilantro or lime wedges if desired.
Enjoy promptly as a refreshing, dessert‑like starter or light dinner.
